generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance VirtualToPhysicalController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated controller for virtual-to-physical interaction based on processed insights from the Digital Twin constellation"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision temperature sensor embedded in permafrost monitoring array measuring ground temperature variations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance SoilMoistureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Capacitive soil moisture sensor array deployed at multiple depths for hydrological monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
]

instance GroundStrainSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Fiber optic distributed strain sensor measuring ground deformation and subsidence patterns"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GroundStrainDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermafrostTemperatureSensor
]

instance SoilMoistureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SoilMoistureSensor
]

instance GroundStrainDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GroundStrainSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PermafrostThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D finite element model simulating permafrost thermal dynamics with seasonal boundary conditions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PermafrostDataProcessingEnabler
]

instance HydrologicalFlowModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Spatial-temporal model of groundwater flow and surface water interaction in permafrost regions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HydrologicalDataProcessingEnabler
]

instance PermafrostTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed time-series temperature data with metadata including sensor calibration dates and measurement intervals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PermafrostDataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SoilMoistureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Multi-depth volumetric moisture content data with quality flags for missing values and sensor drift corrections"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HydrologicalDataProcessingEnabler
]

instance GroundDeformationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Strain rate data converted to displacement measurements with reference to stable benchmark points"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GroundStrainDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StructuralAnalysisEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PermafrostDataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-performance computing cluster with GPU acceleration for permafrost thermal modeling and data assimilation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PermafrostMonitoringService
]

instance HydrologicalDataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Distributed computing environment with specialized hydrological algorithms for moisture transport simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables HydrologicalAnalysisService
]

instance StructuralAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based finite element analysis platform with specialized permafrost mechanics modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables GroundStabilityService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization framework supporting real-time data overlay with historical trend analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance PermafrostMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time thermal state monitoring with anomaly detection and predictive thaw depth estimation"
    DTDFVocab:provides PermafrostStateInsight
]

instance HydrologicalAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Seasonal water balance assessment with permafrost thaw impact modeling"
    DTDFVocab:provides WaterBalanceInsight
]

instance GroundStabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural integrity assessment of near-surface infrastructure with deformation warning thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides StabilityWarningAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Multi-scale visualization of permafrost dynamics with integrated sensor data and model outputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance PermafrostStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current permafrost temperature distribution with 5-year forecast of active layer thickness changes"
]

instance WaterBalanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative assessment of water storage changes in permafrost regions with climate change projections"
]

instance StabilityWarningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alert system for critical ground movement exceeding safety thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D representation of permafrost dynamics supporting scenario exploration and decision-making"
]

// C1: Environment
instance PermafrostEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermafrostTemperatureSensor,
                 SoilMoistureSensor,
                 GroundStrainSensor,
                 VirtualToPhysicalController
]

instance DigitalTwinConstellation : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermafrostThermalModel,
                 HydrologicalFlowModel,
                 PermafrostDataProcessingEnabler,
                 HydrologicalDataProcessingEnabler,
                 StructuralAnalysisEnabler,
                 DataVisualizationEnabler,
                 PermafrostTemperatureData,
                 SoilMoistureData,
                 GroundDeformationData,
                 PermafrostMonitoringService,
                 HydrologicalAnalysisService,
                 GroundStabilityService,
                 VisualizationService
]

instance PermafrostSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Permafrost monitoring system under study"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PermafrostEnvironment
]
